name: Through and Through
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Rune-Carved Bullets
granted_abilities.text: This model's (gun) actions ignore (fortitude) and (warding) abilities.

granted_abilities.name: "I Never Miss Twice!"
granted_abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model fails a (gun) action, it may discard a card. If it does so, it may declare a (gun) action targeting the same model.

granted_abilities.name: Call It a Day
granted_abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it must either drain a (soulstone) or discard a Hermanos de Armas upgrade.

extraction_notes: Upgrade has a 'Hermanos de Armas' header at top indicating keyword restriction
All three abilities are clearly defined with names and rules text
No actions are granted by this upgrade, only passive/triggered abilities
